macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Justice Department Drops Probe into Fed Chair Jerome Powell
items.summary: The DOJ has dropped its investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell, though a partial reversal keeps some drama alive. This follows earlier probes into Fed renovations and removes a key uncertainty for the central bank.

items.title: US Unemployment Claims Rise to 214,000 Amid Labor Market Uncertainty
items.summary: New unemployment claims reached 214,000 in April, signaling uncertainty in the US labor market. This comes as economists highlight mixed signals with high PMI but low consumer confidence.

items.title: Americans' Economic Pessimism Hits New Lows with 47% Rating Conditions Poor
items.summary: Gallup polls show 47% of Americans rating current economic conditions as poor, up 7 points from March, with 73% saying the economy is worsening. The Economic Confidence Index dropped to -38, the lowest since November 2023.

items.title: Economists Predict Dire Inflation Outlook Amid Iran War Tensions
items.summary: Economists warn of rising inflation pressures due to the Iran war, with calls for the Fed to respond to oil shocks. Gold prices gained on Iran talks optimism while Comex gold dropped $53/oz earlier.

items.title: Mixed US Economic Signals: High PMI Contrasts Low Consumer Confidence
items.summary: US economy shows high PMI but low consumer confidence, creating mixed signals amid ongoing inflation concerns. Polls indicate most voters blame external factors for economic woes.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Crypto Futures Liquidations Exceed $137M-185M with BTC, ETH, APE Leading Losses
items.summary: Crypto futures markets saw massive liquidations totaling $137M to $185M in the past 24 hours, primarily long positions in Bitcoin ($12.6M-$14.4M), Ethereum ($6.3M-$24.7M), and APE ($82M). This reflects high volatility and leverage amid market corrections.

items.title: Bitcoin Trades Sideways Around $77K with Minor Fluctuations
items.summary: Bitcoin traded between $77,264-$78,479, closing at $77,590 (up 0.12%) amid $137M+ liquidations, while other reports note consolidation near $74,500-$78,000 and a 0.9% decline. Large holders (sharks) continue silent accumulation despite uncertainty.

items.title: Solana Foundation Lends USDT to Aave, Plans Weekend Integration
items.summary: The Solana Foundation lent USDT to Aave and announced plans to integrate Aave on Solana this weekend, boosting DeFi prospects on the chain. Meanwhile, BNB Chain led with 50.8M active users over 30 days.

items.title: Ethereum Shows Resilience with Best Month Since August 2025
items.summary: Ethereum formed higher lows over 8 years and marked its best month since August 2025, signaling positive momentum. 14 participants joined DeFi United, contributing 69,642 ETH ($161M).

items.title: AWS Integrates Chainlink for Blockchain-Cloud Interoperability
items.summary: Amazon Web Services (AWS) integrated Chainlink, highlighting advancements in blockchain-cloud interoperability. XRP showed bullish signals with mid-day confirmation and potential market impact.

items.title: TRADOOR Token Crashes 90% Below $1 Amid Warnings on Risky Assets
items.summary: TRADOOR token plummeted over 90% below $1, prompting warnings against high-risk tokens. 90% of Solana tokens face value challenges, with a new launchpad claiming prevention measures.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: DeepSeek Releases DeepSeek-V4 with Drastically Reduced Costs
items.summary: Chinese startup DeepSeek released DeepSeek-V4 on Friday with ultra-long context support of one million tokens and drastically reduced compute and memory costs. The model is adapted to run on Huawei chip technology and available as an open-source preview version.

items.title: Tencent Releases Hy3 Preview and Ling-2.6-1T AI Models
items.summary: Tencent unveiled Hy3 preview, a high-efficiency Mixture-of-Experts model for agentic workflows with configurable reasoning levels. inclusionAI also released Ling-2.6-1T, a trillion-parameter model designed for fast execution with costs roughly a quarter of comparable models.

items.title: Claude Opus 4.6 Demonstrates Advanced Task Completion Capabilities
items.summary: As of February 2026, Claude Opus 4.6 can complete tasks that would take humans nearly 12 hours, highlighting significant advances in AI productivity and autonomous task execution.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Insomniac's Marvel's Venom Game Rumors: Cancellation Claims Debunked
items.summary: Shocking claims emerged that Insomniac's Venom video game and DLC were cancelled after Tony Todd's passing, but developers, insiders, and Jason Schreier pushed back, confirming it's still in development with potential PS5/PS6 cross-gen release.

items.title: World of Warcraft Patch 12.0.5 Launches with Major Bugs
items.summary: WoW's Patch 12.0.5 is described as the buggiest in history, featuring broken bonus rolls, disabled strafing, and AFK issues in Decor Duel despite hotfixes.

items.title: Biggest Gaming Leaks and News: Sony PS5 Pro, Nintendo Lawsuit, Xbox Changes
items.summary: Weekly roundup covers PS5 Pro surprises, Nintendo lawsuit, Xbox Game Pass fixes under Asha Sharma, Minds Eye scandal, and Rockstar creator payment issues.

items.title: CMON Invests in NFTs Amid Board Game Lawsuit News
items.summary: CMON announces investment in NFTs; separately, Watch It Played and Game Night Picks face lawsuit, with updates on upcoming board games like Earthborne: Trailblazer.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Citizen Lab Uncovers Two Spying Campaigns Exploiting SS7 and Diameter Protocols in 2G-5G Networks
items.summary: Security researchers detailed two campaigns abusing weaknesses in telecom protocols across 2G, 3G, 4G, and 5G networks to track locations globally.

items.title: Tin Can's $100 Retro Wi-Fi Landline Phone Gains Traction in Schools to Reduce Smartphone Use
items.summary: The viral Tin Can phone is being distributed by schools to students' homes to curb smartphone dependency.

items.title: Samsung Mobile Division Faces First Annual Loss Due to RAM and Storage Shortages
items.summary: Co-CEO TM Roh warned leaders of potential first-ever yearly loss for MX division amid escalating component shortages and costs.

items.title: Intel Shares Hit Record High on Strong Outlook Under CEO Lip-Bu Tan's Turnaround Efforts
items.summary: Intel's upbeat forecast, strengthened balance sheet, and operational improvements signal progress in company recovery.

items.title: $16B Financing Closes for Oracle's Massive Michigan Data Center
items.summary: Bank of America sold $14B in bonds to fund the giant campus after prolonged negotiations.
